name: Marinated Sirloin Steak (Overnight)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place steak in a shallow dish or large heavy-duty resealable plastic bag.
2. Combine remaining ingredients; pour over the meat. Cover or seal and refrigerate overnight.
3. Remove meat; discard marinade.
4. Grill, uncovered, over medium coals until meat is cooked as desired: 6-7 minutes per side for rare, 8-10 minutes per side for medium, or 11-13 minutes for well-done.
